---
title: "combined-data-build"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, ggplot2, dplyr, lubridate)
```

```{r}
# read hcris and kff data
hcris.dat <- read_csv('../data/output/HCRIS_Data_v2010.csv')
kff.dat <- read_csv('../data/output/medicaid-kff.csv')
```


```{r}
# make state crosswalk
state_xwalk <- tibble(
  state_abb  = state.abb,
  state_name = state.name
)
state_xwalk
```

```{r}
# merge kff and hcris data
combined.dat <- hcris.dat %>% 
  left_join(state_xwalk, by = c("state" = "state_abb")) %>%
  left_join(kff.dat, by = c("state_name" = "State")) %>% 
  filter(state != "DC") %>% 
  select(-state_name)

write_csv(combined.dat, '../data/output/combined_hcris_mcaid.csv')
```

```{r}
kff.dat
```

```{r}
hcris.dat
```
